mapper.select:
select * from ( select origin.*, count(*) over() as total_count, row_number() over(order by origin.play_count desc, origin.partner_name asc) as rn from (select tm2.streamer_no as partner_no, s.streamer_name as partner_name, s.streamer_soop_id as partner_soop_id, count(*) as play_count,
max(case when tr.tournament_name like '%멸망전%' then 'Y' else 'N' end) as withOfficial, max(case when t.team_ranking like '우승' then 'Y' else 'N' end) as withChampion, max(case when t.team_ranking like '준우승' then 'Y' else 'N' end) as withFinal from team_member tm1 join team_member tm2 on tm1.team_id = tm2.team_id and tm1.streamer_no != tm2.streamer_no join streamer s on tm2.streamer_no = s.streamer_no join team t on tm1.team_id = t.team_id join tournament tr on t.tournament_id = tr.tournament_id where tm1.streamer_no = #{keyword}
and lower(s.streamer_name) like '%' || lower(#{searchKeyword}) || '%'
group by tm2.streamer_no, s.streamer_name, s.streamer_soop_id ) origin ) where rn between #{begin} and #{end} order by rn

select t.team_name as teamName, tl.tournament_id as tournamentId, tl.tournament_year as tournamentYear, tl.tournament_name as tournamentName, t.team_ranking as teamRanking from team_member tm1 join team_member tm2 on tm1.team_id = tm2.team_id join team t on tm1.team_id = t.team_id left outer join tournament_list tl on t.tournament_id = tl.tournament_id where tm1.streamer_no = #{streamerNo} and tm2.streamer_no = #{partnerNo} order by tournamentYear desc
